meta.description: KET高频词汇+标准例句库 四年级4个月冲刺版

words.sentence1: I am **able** to swim very well.
words.sentence1_cn: 我很会游泳。
words.sentence2: She is **able** to finish her homework on time.
words.sentence2_cn: 她能按时完成作业。

words.sentence1: My little brother is very **active** at school.
words.sentence1_cn: 我弟弟在学校很活跃。
words.sentence2: She likes **active** sports like running and swimming.
words.sentence2_cn: 她喜欢跑步和游泳这样的运动。

words.sentence1: The boy was very **brave** at the dentist.
words.sentence1_cn: 那个男孩在牙医那里非常勇敢。
words.sentence2: You must be **brave** when you feel scared.
words.sentence2_cn: 当你感到害怕时，要勇敢。

words.sentence1: Please stay **calm** and listen to the teacher.
words.sentence1_cn: 请保持冷静，听老师说话。
words.sentence2: She is always **calm** before her exams.
words.sentence2_cn: 她考试前总是很冷静。

words.sentence1: Be **careful** when you cross the road.
words.sentence1_cn: 过马路时要小心。
words.sentence2: She is very **careful** with her schoolwork.
words.sentence2_cn: 她对学业非常仔细认真。

words.sentence1: My friend is very **clever** at maths.
words.sentence1_cn: 我的朋友数学很聪明。
words.sentence2: That was a **clever** answer to the question.
words.sentence2_cn: 那是对这道题非常聪明的回答。

words.sentence1: She felt very **confident** before the show.
words.sentence1_cn: 演出前她感到非常自信。
words.sentence2: He is **confident** about his English test.
words.sentence2_cn: 他对英语考试很有信心。

words.sentence1: My sister is very **creative** and loves painting.
words.sentence1_cn: 我姐姐很有创造力，喜欢画画。
words.sentence2: We need **creative** ideas for the school project.
words.sentence2_cn: 我们需要有创意的想法来做学校项目。

words.sentence1: The new teacher is very **friendly** to all students.
words.sentence1_cn: 新老师对所有学生都很友好。
words.sentence2: Everyone in my class is **friendly** and helpful.
words.sentence2_cn: 我班上的每个人都友好且乐于助人。

words.sentence1: My grandfather is very **generous** with his money.
words.sentence1_cn: 我爷爷花钱很大方。
words.sentence2: She is **generous** and always shares her food.
words.sentence2_cn: 她很慷慨，总是分享她的食物。

words.sentence1: It is important to be **honest** with your friends.
words.sentence1_cn: 对朋友诚实是很重要的。
words.sentence2: An **honest** person always tells the truth.
words.sentence2_cn: 诚实的人总是说实话。

words.sentence1: It was very **kind** of you to help me.
words.sentence1_cn: 你帮助我真是太好了。
words.sentence2: She is **kind** to animals and loves cats.
words.sentence2_cn: 她对动物很善良，喜欢猫。

words.sentence1: Don't be **lazy** – finish your homework first.
words.sentence1_cn: 不要懒惰，先把作业做完。
words.sentence2: My cat is very **lazy** and sleeps all day.
words.sentence2_cn: 我的猫很懒，整天睡觉。

words.sentence1: Good teachers are always **patient** with their students.
words.sentence1_cn: 好老师总是对学生很有耐心。
words.sentence2: You need to be **patient** when you learn a new skill.
words.sentence2_cn: 学习新技能时需要有耐心。

words.sentence1: It is **polite** to say thank you after a meal.
words.sentence1_cn: 饭后说谢谢是有礼貌的。
words.sentence2: She is always **polite** and says please and thank you.
words.sentence2_cn: 她总是很有礼貌，说请和谢谢。

words.sentence1: Please be **quiet** in the library.
words.sentence1_cn: 在图书馆请保持安静。
words.sentence2: She is a **quiet** girl but very clever.
words.sentence2_cn: 她是个安静的女孩，但很聪明。

words.sentence1: He is too **shy** to speak in front of the class.
words.sentence1_cn: 他太害羞了，不敢在全班面前讲话。
words.sentence2: She was **shy** on her first day at school.
words.sentence2_cn: 她第一天上学时很害羞。

words.sentence1: That was a very **smart** idea!
words.sentence1_cn: 那是个非常聪明的主意！
words.sentence2: She is **smart** and always gets good marks.
words.sentence2_cn: 她很聪明，总是得高分。

words.sentence1: Our maths teacher is very **strict** about homework.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们的数学老师对作业非常严格。
words.sentence2: My parents are **strict** but they care about me.
words.sentence2_cn: 我的父母很严格，但他们关心我。

words.sentence1: It was **thoughtful** of her to bring me a gift.
words.sentence1_cn: 她给我带礼物真是很体贴。
words.sentence2: He is a **thoughtful** son and always helps his mother.
words.sentence2_cn: 他是个体贴的儿子，总是帮助妈妈。

words.sentence1: All students must **attend** the morning meeting.
words.sentence1_cn: 所有学生必须参加早上的会议。
words.sentence2: Did you **attend** the school sports day last week?
words.sentence2_cn: 你上周参加学校运动日了吗？

words.sentence1: Can I **borrow** your pen, please?
words.sentence1_cn: 请问我能借你的笔吗？
words.sentence2: She **borrowed** a book from the school library.
words.sentence2_cn: 她从学校图书馆借了一本书。

words.sentence1: Please **complete** your homework before dinner.
words.sentence1_cn: 请在晚饭前完成你的作业。
words.sentence2: He **completed** all the questions in the test.
words.sentence2_cn: 他完成了考试中的所有题目。

words.sentence1: Please **copy** the sentences into your notebook.
words.sentence1_cn: 请把句子抄写到你的笔记本上。
words.sentence2: Do not **copy** your friend's answers in the test.
words.sentence2_cn: 考试中不要抄你朋友的答案。

words.sentence1: Let's **discuss** our plans for the school trip.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们来讨论一下学校旅行的计划。
words.sentence2: The class **discussed** the story for ten minutes.
words.sentence2_cn: 全班讨论了这个故事十分钟。

words.sentence1: Can you **explain** the rule again, please?
words.sentence1_cn: 请你再解释一遍这个规则好吗？
words.sentence2: The teacher **explained** the new words clearly.
words.sentence2_cn: 老师清楚地解释了新单词。

words.sentence1: I **finished** my homework before dinner.
words.sentence1_cn: 我在晚饭前完成了作业。
words.sentence2: Have you **finished** reading that book yet?
words.sentence2_cn: 你读完那本书了吗？

words.sentence1: Don't **forget** to bring your school bag tomorrow.
words.sentence1_cn: 别忘了明天带你的书包。
words.sentence2: She **forgot** her lunch at home this morning.
words.sentence2_cn: 今天早上她把午饭忘在家里了。

words.sentence1: Would you like to **join** our reading club?
words.sentence1_cn: 你想加入我们的阅读俱乐部吗？
words.sentence2: He **joined** the school football team last year.
words.sentence2_cn: 他去年加入了学校足球队。

words.sentence1: I am learning to **learn** new English words every day.
words.sentence1_cn: 我每天都在学新的英语单词。
words.sentence2: She **learnt** to ride a bike when she was six.
words.sentence2_cn: 她六岁时学会了骑自行车。

words.sentence1: Can you **lend** me your ruler for a minute?
words.sentence1_cn: 你能把你的尺借给我一下吗？
words.sentence2: She **lent** her dictionary to her classmate.
words.sentence2_cn: 她把词典借给了她的同学。

words.sentence1: I **missed** the school bus this morning.
words.sentence1_cn: 今天早上我错过了校车。
words.sentence2: She **misses** her old friends from primary school.
words.sentence2_cn: 她很想念小学时的老朋友。

words.sentence1: You should **practise** your English every day.
words.sentence1_cn: 你应该每天练习英语。
words.sentence2: She **practised** the piano for one hour after school.
words.sentence2_cn: 她放学后练了一个小时的钢琴。

words.sentence1: I **prepared** my bag the night before school.
words.sentence1_cn: 我在上学前一晚准备好了书包。
words.sentence2: Let's **prepare** for the English test together.
words.sentence2_cn: 让我们一起为英语考试做准备。

words.sentence1: I **promise** to finish my homework tonight.
words.sentence1_cn: 我答应今晚完成作业。
words.sentence2: She **promised** her mum to be home by five.
words.sentence2_cn: 她答应妈妈五点前回家。

words.sentence1: **Remember** to take your book to class.
words.sentence1_cn: 记得带你的书去上课。
words.sentence2: Do you **remember** the words from last week?
words.sentence2_cn: 你记得上周的单词吗？

words.sentence1: Please **repeat** the word after the teacher.
words.sentence1_cn: 请跟着老师重复这个单词。
words.sentence2: Can you **repeat** that sentence more slowly?
words.sentence2_cn: 你能把那个句子说得慢一点吗？

words.sentence1: Please **share** your ideas with the class.
words.sentence1_cn: 请和全班分享你的想法。
words.sentence2: She **shared** her lunch with her best friend.
words.sentence2_cn: 她和最好的朋友分享了午饭。

words.sentence1: I **study** English for two hours every evening.
words.sentence1_cn: 我每天晚上学习英语两个小时。
words.sentence2: She **studied** hard and passed all her exams.
words.sentence2_cn: 她努力学习，通过了所有考试。

words.sentence1: Don't **waste** your time playing games all day.
words.sentence1_cn: 不要整天玩游戏浪费时间。
words.sentence2: It is bad to **waste** food and water.
words.sentence2_cn: 浪费食物和水是不好的。

words.sentence1: We cannot **afford** to buy a new computer now.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们现在买不起新电脑。
words.sentence2: Can you **afford** the price of that jacket?
words.sentence2_cn: 你买得起那件夹克吗？

words.sentence1: This coat was a real **bargain** – only ten pounds!
words.sentence1_cn: 这件外套真是便宜货——只要十英镑！
words.sentence2: Mum loves to find a good **bargain** at the market.
words.sentence2_cn: 妈妈喜欢在市场上找便宜货。

words.sentence1: I want to **buy** a new book this weekend.
words.sentence1_cn: 我这周末想买一本新书。
words.sentence2: She **bought** some fruit at the market yesterday.
words.sentence2_cn: 她昨天在市场买了一些水果。

words.sentence1: These shoes are very **cheap** and comfortable.
words.sentence1_cn: 这些鞋子很便宜而且舒适。
words.sentence2: Is there a **cheap** restaurant near here?
words.sentence2_cn: 这附近有便宜的餐厅吗？

words.sentence1: Please **choose** a book from the shelf.
words.sentence1_cn: 请从书架上选一本书。
words.sentence2: She **chose** the blue dress for the party.
words.sentence2_cn: 她为派对选了蓝色连衣裙。

words.sentence1: This book **costs** ten pounds.
words.sentence1_cn: 这本书花了十英镑。
words.sentence2: How much does the ticket **cost**?
words.sentence2_cn: 这张票多少钱？

words.sentence1: This cake is really **delicious**!
words.sentence1_cn: 这个蛋糕真的太好吃了！
words.sentence2: Mum made a **delicious** soup for dinner.
words.sentence2_cn: 妈妈做了一道美味的汤作为晚餐。

words.sentence1: That coat is too **expensive** for me.
words.sentence1_cn: 那件外套对我来说太贵了。
words.sentence2: Eating at that restaurant is very **expensive**.
words.sentence2_cn: 在那家餐厅吃饭非常贵。

words.sentence1: I like to eat **fresh** fruit every morning.
words.sentence1_cn: 我喜欢每天早上吃新鲜水果。
words.sentence2: The bread from the bakery is always **fresh**.
words.sentence2_cn: 面包店的面包总是新鲜的。

words.sentence1: I am very **hungry** after school.
words.sentence1_cn: 放学后我非常饿。
words.sentence2: Are you **hungry**? Let's have a snack.
words.sentence2_cn: 你饿了吗？我们来吃点零食吧。

words.sentence1: Could we see the **menu**, please?
words.sentence1_cn: 请问我们可以看菜单吗？
words.sentence2: The **menu** at this café looks really good.
words.sentence2_cn: 这家咖啡馆的菜单看起来很不错。

words.sentence1: I would like to **order** a sandwich, please.
words.sentence1_cn: 我想点一个三明治，谢谢。
words.sentence2: She **ordered** a pizza and a glass of juice.
words.sentence2_cn: 她点了一份披萨和一杯果汁。

words.sentence1: What is the **price** of this T-shirt?
words.sentence1_cn: 这件T恤的价格是多少？
words.sentence2: The **price** of food is higher this year.
words.sentence2_cn: 今年食品的价格更高了。

words.sentence1: I **received** a lovely birthday card from my friend.
words.sentence1_cn: 我收到了朋友寄来的漂亮生日贺卡。
words.sentence2: She **received** a prize for her painting.
words.sentence2_cn: 她因为她的画作获得了一个奖。

words.sentence1: This shop **sells** books and magazines.
words.sentence1_cn: 这家店出售书籍和杂志。
words.sentence2: They **sold** all the cakes by lunchtime.
words.sentence2_cn: 他们在午饭前就把蛋糕全部卖完了。

words.sentence1: This soup **tastes** very good.
words.sentence1_cn: 这道汤味道很好。
words.sentence2: **Taste** this apple – it is very sweet.
words.sentence2_cn: 尝一尝这个苹果——它非常甜。

words.sentence1: I am very **thirsty** after running.
words.sentence1_cn: 跑步后我非常渴。
words.sentence2: Are you **thirsty**? Have some water.
words.sentence2_cn: 你渴了吗？喝点水吧。

words.sentence1: We eat **traditional** food at New Year.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们在新年吃传统食物。
words.sentence2: She wore a **traditional** dress at the festival.
words.sentence2_cn: 她在节日上穿了一件传统服装。

words.sentence1: This bag is good **value** for money.
words.sentence1_cn: 这个包物有所值。
words.sentence2: Family is the most important **value** in life.
words.sentence2_cn: 家庭是生活中最重要的价值。

words.sentence1: We arrived at the **airport** two hours early.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们提前两小时到达了机场。
words.sentence2: The **airport** is far from the city centre.
words.sentence2_cn: 机场离市中心很远。

words.sentence1: What time does the train **arrive** in London?
words.sentence1_cn: 火车几点到达伦敦？
words.sentence2: She **arrived** at school ten minutes late.
words.sentence2_cn: 她上学迟到了十分钟。

words.sentence1: We walked across a long **bridge** over the river.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们走过了一座横跨河流的长桥。
words.sentence2: There is an old **bridge** near our village.
words.sentence2_cn: 我们村附近有一座古老的桥。

words.sentence1: I love walking in the **countryside** at weekends.
words.sentence1_cn: 我喜欢在周末去乡村散步。
words.sentence2: The **countryside** is quiet and very beautiful.
words.sentence2_cn: 乡村很安静，非常美丽。

words.sentence1: Can you tell me the **direction** to the station?
words.sentence1_cn: 你能告诉我去车站的方向吗？
words.sentence2: We followed the **direction** on the map.
words.sentence2_cn: 我们按照地图上的方向走。

words.sentence1: We saw many animals in the **forest**.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们在森林里看到了许多动物。
words.sentence2: The **forest** near our town is very old.
words.sentence2_cn: 我们镇附近的森林非常古老。

words.sentence1: The **journey** from London to Paris takes two hours.
words.sentence1_cn: 从伦敦到巴黎的旅程需要两个小时。
words.sentence2: We had a long **journey** by train to the coast.
words.sentence2_cn: 我们乘火车去海边进行了漫长的旅程。

words.sentence1: The bus **leaves** at half past eight.
words.sentence1_cn: 公共汽车八点半出发。
words.sentence2: We **left** home early to catch the train.
words.sentence2_cn: 我们早早离开家去赶火车。

words.sentence1: We went hiking in the **mountains** last summer.
words.sentence1_cn: 去年夏天我们去山里徒步。
words.sentence2: The **mountain** is covered with snow in winter.
words.sentence2_cn: 冬天这座山被雪覆盖着。

words.sentence1: Follow the **path** through the park.
words.sentence1_cn: 沿着穿过公园的小路走。
words.sentence2: There is a narrow **path** along the river.
words.sentence2_cn: 沿着河边有一条狭窄的小路。

words.sentence1: The **railway** station is ten minutes away.
words.sentence1_cn: 火车站距离这里十分钟。
words.sentence2: We crossed the **railway** bridge on our walk.
words.sentence2_cn: 我们散步时穿越了铁路桥。

words.sentence1: This is the fastest **route** to the school.
words.sentence1_cn: 这是去学校最快的路线。
words.sentence2: We planned our **route** on a map before the trip.
words.sentence2_cn: 旅行前我们在地图上规划了路线。

words.sentence1: Meet me at the bus **station** at three o'clock.
words.sentence1_cn: 三点钟在公共汽车站见我。
words.sentence2: The train **station** is very busy on Mondays.
words.sentence2_cn: 火车站在周一非常繁忙。

words.sentence1: There was a big **storm** last night.
words.sentence1_cn: 昨晚有一场大暴风雨。
words.sentence2: The **storm** made it impossible to go outside.
words.sentence2_cn: 暴风雨使得我们无法外出。

words.sentence1: Many **tourists** visit the castle every year.
words.sentence1_cn: 每年有许多游客参观这座城堡。
words.sentence2: The **tourist** map shows all the main sights.
words.sentence2_cn: 游客地图显示了所有主要景点。

words.sentence1: There is a lot of **traffic** in the city centre.
words.sentence1_cn: 市中心有很多交通拥挤。
words.sentence2: The bus was late because of heavy **traffic**.
words.sentence2_cn: 公共汽车因为交通拥堵而晚点了。

words.sentence1: I would love to **travel** around the world.
words.sentence1_cn: 我很想环游世界。
words.sentence2: We **travelled** by train to visit our grandparents.
words.sentence2_cn: 我们乘火车去看望祖父母。

words.sentence1: What is the **weather** like today?
words.sentence1_cn: 今天天气怎么样？
words.sentence2: The **weather** was warm and sunny during our holiday.
words.sentence2_cn: 假期期间天气温暖而晴朗。

words.sentence1: The **wind** is very strong today.
words.sentence1_cn: 今天风很大。
words.sentence2: A cold **wind** blew across the playground.
words.sentence2_cn: 一阵冷风吹过操场。

words.sentence1: It is very **windy** today – hold your hat!
words.sentence1_cn: 今天风很大——抓住你的帽子！
words.sentence2: We could not fly our kite because it was too **windy**.
words.sentence2_cn: 因为风太大，我们无法放风筝。

words.sentence1: Swimming is my favourite after-school **activity**.
words.sentence1_cn: 游泳是我最喜欢的课外活动。
words.sentence2: The school has many **activities** for students.
words.sentence2_cn: 学校为学生提供很多活动。

words.sentence1: She wants to be an **artist** when she grows up.
words.sentence1_cn: 她长大后想成为一名艺术家。
words.sentence2: The **artist** painted a beautiful picture of the sea.
words.sentence2_cn: 这位艺术家画了一幅美丽的海景画。

words.sentence1: We **celebrate** birthdays with a cake and songs.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们用蛋糕和歌曲庆祝生日。
words.sentence2: They **celebrated** the New Year with fireworks.
words.sentence2_cn: 他们用烟火庆祝新年。

words.sentence1: We went to a music **concert** last Saturday.
words.sentence1_cn: 上周六我们去看了一场音乐会。
words.sentence2: The school **concert** was really wonderful.
words.sentence2_cn: 学校音乐会真的非常精彩。

words.sentence1: I love to **dance** to pop music.
words.sentence1_cn: 我喜欢随着流行音乐跳舞。
words.sentence2: She **danced** at the school show last week.
words.sentence2_cn: 她上周在学校演出中跳舞了。

words.sentence1: **Exercise** is very important for good health.
words.sentence1_cn: 锻炼对健康非常重要。
words.sentence2: She **exercises** every morning before school.
words.sentence2_cn: 她每天早上上学前锻炼。

words.sentence1: My favourite **festival** is the Spring Festival.
words.sentence1_cn: 我最喜欢的节日是春节。
words.sentence2: There is a music **festival** in our town every summer.
words.sentence2_cn: 我们镇每年夏天都有音乐节。

words.sentence1: My **hobby** is collecting stamps and postcards.
words.sentence1_cn: 我的爱好是收集邮票和明信片。
words.sentence2: What is your favourite **hobby** after school?
words.sentence2_cn: 你课后最喜欢的爱好是什么？

words.sentence1: Eating fruit and vegetables keeps you **healthy**.
words.sentence1_cn: 吃水果和蔬菜能让你保持健康。
words.sentence2: She lives a **healthy** life and goes running every day.
words.sentence2_cn: 她过着健康的生活，每天跑步。

words.sentence1: I am very **interested** in learning about animals.
words.sentence1_cn: 我对学习动物知识非常感兴趣。
words.sentence2: Are you **interested** in joining the art club?
words.sentence2_cn: 你有兴趣加入美术俱乐部吗？

words.sentence1: We watched a football **match** on Saturday.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们星期六看了一场足球比赛。
words.sentence2: Our school won the basketball **match** yesterday.
words.sentence2_cn: 我们学校昨天赢了篮球比赛。

words.sentence1: I listen to **music** every evening before bed.
words.sentence1_cn: 我每晚睡前听音乐。
words.sentence2: She plays **music** and dances at the school show.
words.sentence2_cn: 她在学校演出中演奏音乐并跳舞。

words.sentence1: I like to **relax** by reading after school.
words.sentence1_cn: 我喜欢放学后通过读书来放松。
words.sentence2: **Relax** and take a deep breath before the test.
words.sentence2_cn: 考试前放松一下，深呼吸。

words.sentence1: My favourite **sport** is swimming.
words.sentence1_cn: 我最喜欢的运动是游泳。
words.sentence2: She plays **sport** every day to stay fit.
words.sentence2_cn: 她每天运动以保持健康。

words.sentence1: She has a great **talent** for singing.
words.sentence1_cn: 她有很高的唱歌天赋。
words.sentence2: Everyone has a special **talent** of their own.
words.sentence2_cn: 每个人都有自己特别的天赋。

words.sentence1: I feel very **tired** after my swimming lesson.
words.sentence1_cn: 游泳课后我感到非常疲惫。
words.sentence2: She was **tired** but still finished her homework.
words.sentence2_cn: 她虽然很累，但还是完成了作业。

words.sentence1: She is a **volunteer** at the local library.
words.sentence1_cn: 她是当地图书馆的志愿者。
words.sentence2: Many **volunteers** helped clean the park.
words.sentence2_cn: 许多志愿者帮助清洁公园。

words.sentence1: Our team **won** the football match last weekend.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们队上周末赢了足球比赛。
words.sentence2: She **won** first prize in the art competition.
words.sentence2_cn: 她在美术比赛中获得了一等奖。

words.sentence1: We had a **wonderful** time at the festival.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们在节日上度过了美好的时光。
words.sentence2: What a **wonderful** surprise to see you here!
words.sentence2_cn: 在这里见到你真是太惊喜了！

words.sentence1: She sat **alone** in the classroom after school.
words.sentence1_cn: 放学后她独自坐在教室里。
words.sentence2: I don't like going to the cinema **alone**.
words.sentence2_cn: 我不喜欢独自去电影院。

words.sentence1: My dad was **angry** when I came home late.
words.sentence1_cn: 我回家晚了，爸爸很生气。
words.sentence2: She was **angry** because I lost her book.
words.sentence2_cn: 她很生气，因为我弄丢了她的书。

words.sentence1: She wore a **beautiful** dress to the party.
words.sentence1_cn: 她穿了一件漂亮的裙子去派对。
words.sentence2: The flowers in the garden are **beautiful** in spring.
words.sentence2_cn: 花园里的花在春天很美丽。

words.sentence1: I felt **bored** because there was nothing to do.
words.sentence1_cn: 我感到无聊，因为没有什么事情可做。
words.sentence2: She was **bored** at home during the holidays.
words.sentence2_cn: 假期在家时她感到无聊。

words.sentence1: The sun is very **bright** this morning.
words.sentence1_cn: 今天早上阳光非常明亮。
words.sentence2: She is a **bright** student who loves reading.
words.sentence2_cn: 她是一个聪明的学生，喜欢读书。

words.sentence1: Please keep your desk **clean** and tidy.
words.sentence1_cn: 请保持你的桌子干净整洁。
words.sentence2: We **cleaned** the classroom before going home.
words.sentence2_cn: 我们回家前打扫了教室。

words.sentence1: It is very **cold** outside today.
words.sentence1_cn: 今天外面非常寒冷。
words.sentence2: Put on a coat because it is **cold**.
words.sentence2_cn: 穿上外套，因为天气很冷。

words.sentence1: The weather is nice and **cool** in autumn.
words.sentence1_cn: 秋天天气凉爽宜人。
words.sentence2: That is a really **cool** bike!
words.sentence2_cn: 那辆自行车真的很酷！

words.sentence1: It is **dangerous** to run near the swimming pool.
words.sentence1_cn: 在游泳池附近跑步是危险的。
words.sentence2: Swimming in the sea alone can be **dangerous**.
words.sentence2_cn: 独自在海里游泳可能很危险。

words.sentence1: It is very **dark** outside at night.
words.sentence1_cn: 夜里外面非常黑暗。
words.sentence2: She is afraid of the **dark** and uses a night light.
words.sentence2_cn: 她怕黑，所以用夜灯。

words.sentence1: My sister and I have very **different** hobbies.
words.sentence1_cn: 我和姐姐有非常不同的爱好。
words.sentence2: These two books are **different** from each other.
words.sentence2_cn: 这两本书彼此不同。

words.sentence1: The maths test was very **difficult** today.
words.sentence1_cn: 今天的数学考试非常难。
words.sentence2: Learning a new language can be **difficult** at first.
words.sentence2_cn: 学习一门新语言起初可能很困难。

words.sentence1: My shoes are very **dirty** after playing outside.
words.sentence1_cn: 在外面玩耍后我的鞋子很脏。
words.sentence2: Please wash your hands because they are **dirty**.
words.sentence2_cn: 请洗手，因为你的手很脏。

words.sentence1: The first question in the test was very **easy**.
words.sentence1_cn: 考试中的第一道题非常容易。
words.sentence2: This recipe is very **easy** to follow.
words.sentence2_cn: 这个食谱非常容易跟着做。

words.sentence1: I am very **excited** about my birthday party.
words.sentence1_cn: 我对生日派对非常兴奋。
words.sentence2: She was **excited** when she heard the good news.
words.sentence2_cn: 当她听到好消息时非常兴奋。

words.sentence1: Paris is **famous** for its beautiful buildings.
words.sentence1_cn: 巴黎以其美丽的建筑而闻名。
words.sentence2: She is a **famous** singer all over the world.
words.sentence2_cn: 她是全球知名的歌手。

words.sentence1: She is the **fastest** runner in our class.
words.sentence1_cn: 她是我们班跑得最快的。
words.sentence2: The car drove very **fast** on the motorway.
words.sentence2_cn: 汽车在高速公路上开得很快。

words.sentence1: The **fat** cat sat on the warm sofa.
words.sentence1_cn: 那只胖猫坐在温暖的沙发上。
words.sentence2: Eating too much sugar can make you **fat**.
words.sentence2_cn: 吃太多糖会让你变胖。

words.sentence1: She goes running every day to stay **fit**.
words.sentence1_cn: 她每天跑步以保持健康。
words.sentence2: You need to get **fit** before the swimming race.
words.sentence2_cn: 你需要在游泳比赛前保持健康。

words.sentence1: My dad always tells **funny** jokes at dinner.
words.sentence1_cn: 我爸爸总是在晚饭时讲有趣的笑话。
words.sentence2: The cartoon was very **funny** and we all laughed.
words.sentence2_cn: 这部卡通片非常有趣，我们都笑了。

words.sentence1: **Add** some salt to the soup, please.
words.sentence1_cn: 请往汤里加点盐。
words.sentence2: She **added** her name to the list.
words.sentence2_cn: 她把名字加到了名单上。

words.sentence1: We are not **allowed** to use phones in class.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们在课堂上不允许使用手机。
words.sentence2: My parents **allow** me to watch TV for one hour.
words.sentence2_cn: 我父母允许我看一小时电视。

words.sentence1: Please **answer** all the questions in the test.
words.sentence1_cn: 请回答考试中的所有问题。
words.sentence2: She **answered** the teacher's question correctly.
words.sentence2_cn: 她正确回答了老师的问题。

words.sentence1: You can **ask** the teacher if you do not understand.
words.sentence1_cn: 如果你不明白，可以问老师。
words.sentence2: She **asked** her friend for help with the homework.
words.sentence2_cn: 她请朋友帮助做作业。

words.sentence1: I **believe** you can pass the KET exam.
words.sentence1_cn: 我相信你能通过KET考试。
words.sentence2: Do you **believe** this story is true?
words.sentence2_cn: 你相信这个故事是真的吗？

words.sentence1: Be careful! Don't **break** the glasses.
words.sentence1_cn: 小心！不要打破玻璃杯。
words.sentence2: She **broke** her arm when she fell off her bike.
words.sentence2_cn: 她从自行车上摔下来，摔断了手臂。

words.sentence1: Please **bring** your book to class tomorrow.
words.sentence1_cn: 请明天把你的书带到课上。
words.sentence2: She **brought** some cakes to share with the class.
words.sentence2_cn: 她带了一些蛋糕和全班同学分享。

words.sentence1: We **built** a sandcastle on the beach.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们在海滩上建造了一座沙堡。
words.sentence2: He wants to **build** a treehouse in the garden.
words.sentence2_cn: 他想在花园里搭建一个树屋。

words.sentence1: She **called** her grandmother every Sunday.
words.sentence1_cn: 她每个星期天给祖母打电话。
words.sentence2: What do you **call** this animal in English?
words.sentence2_cn: 这种动物用英语怎么称呼？

words.sentence1: Can you **carry** this heavy bag for me?
words.sentence1_cn: 你能帮我搬这个重包吗？
words.sentence2: She **carried** her lunch in a small bag.
words.sentence2_cn: 她用一个小包带着她的午饭。

words.sentence1: She **caught** the ball and threw it back.
words.sentence1_cn: 她接住球后又把球扔了回去。
words.sentence2: Hurry up or you will miss the bus – we have to **catch** it!
words.sentence2_cn: 快点，不然你会错过公共汽车的，我们得赶上它！

words.sentence1: I will **change** my clothes after school.
words.sentence1_cn: 我放学后会换衣服。
words.sentence2: The weather can **change** very quickly in spring.
words.sentence2_cn: 春天天气变化很快。

words.sentence1: Please **check** your answers before handing in the test.
words.sentence1_cn: 交卷前请检查你的答案。
words.sentence2: She **checked** her bag to make sure she had her keys.
words.sentence2_cn: 她检查了包以确保带了钥匙。

words.sentence1: Please **close** the door when you leave.
words.sentence1_cn: 离开时请关门。
words.sentence2: The shop **closes** at six o'clock in the evening.
words.sentence2_cn: 商店晚上六点关门。

words.sentence1: He loves to **collect** football cards.
words.sentence1_cn: 他喜欢收集足球卡。
words.sentence2: We **collected** leaves in the park last autumn.
words.sentence2_cn: 去年秋天我们在公园里收集了树叶。

words.sentence1: Please **come** to my birthday party on Saturday.
words.sentence1_cn: 请来参加我星期六的生日派对。
words.sentence2: She **came** home late after her dance class.
words.sentence2_cn: 舞蹈课后她很晚才回家。

words.sentence1: My mum **cooks** dinner for us every evening.
words.sentence1_cn: 我妈妈每天晚上为我们做晚饭。
words.sentence2: I **cooked** pasta for the first time last week.
words.sentence2_cn: 上周我第一次做了意大利面。

words.sentence1: Please **cut** the bread into small pieces.
words.sentence1_cn: 请把面包切成小块。
words.sentence2: She **cut** some flowers from the garden for the table.
words.sentence2_cn: 她从花园里剪了一些花放在桌子上。

words.sentence1: We **decided** to go to the park after lunch.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们决定午饭后去公园。
words.sentence2: Have you **decided** what to study at university?
words.sentence2_cn: 你决定好大学要学什么了吗？

words.sentence1: I always **do** my homework before dinner.
words.sentence1_cn: 我总是在晚饭前做作业。
words.sentence2: What did you **do** last weekend?
words.sentence2_cn: 你上周末做了什么？

words.sentence1: You should **drink** eight glasses of water each day.
words.sentence1_cn: 你每天应该喝八杯水。
words.sentence2: What would you like to **drink** with your meal?
words.sentence2_cn: 用餐时你想喝什么？

words.sentence1: My dad **drives** me to school every morning.
words.sentence1_cn: 我爸爸每天早上开车送我上学。
words.sentence2: She learned to **drive** when she was eighteen.
words.sentence2_cn: 她十八岁时学会了开车。

words.sentence1: We **eat** breakfast together every morning.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们每天早上一起吃早饭。
words.sentence2: She **ate** a big bowl of noodles for lunch.
words.sentence2_cn: 她午饭吃了一大碗面条。

words.sentence1: I **feed** my pet cat twice a day.
words.sentence1_cn: 我每天喂猫咪两次。
words.sentence2: She **fed** the ducks at the park last Sunday.
words.sentence2_cn: 上周日她在公园喂了鸭子。

words.sentence1: Please **fill** the bottle with cold water.
words.sentence1_cn: 请把瓶子装满冷水。
words.sentence2: She **filled** the bag with books and left for school.
words.sentence2_cn: 她把书装进包里，然后去上学了。

words.sentence1: I cannot **find** my school bag anywhere.
words.sentence1_cn: 我到处找不到我的书包。
words.sentence2: She **found** a ten pound note on the street.
words.sentence2_cn: 她在街上发现了一张十英镑的钞票。

words.sentence1: Dad **fixed** my bike after it broke.
words.sentence1_cn: 自行车坏了之后，爸爸帮我修好了。
words.sentence2: Can you **fix** the broken chair in the kitchen?
words.sentence2_cn: 你能修好厨房里那把坏椅子吗？

words.sentence1: Birds **fly** south in autumn.
words.sentence1_cn: 鸟在秋天往南飞。
words.sentence2: We **flew** to Spain for our summer holiday.
words.sentence2_cn: 我们乘飞机去西班牙度暑假。

words.sentence1: Please **forgive** me – I did not mean to be late.
words.sentence1_cn: 请原谅我——我不是故意迟到的。
words.sentence2: She **forgave** her friend after their argument.
words.sentence2_cn: 她原谅了争吵后的朋友。

words.sentence1: I **got** a new book for my birthday.
words.sentence1_cn: 我生日收到了一本新书。
words.sentence2: Can you **get** some milk from the shop?
words.sentence2_cn: 你能去商店买些牛奶吗？

words.sentence1: My grandmother **gave** me a lovely gift.
words.sentence1_cn: 我祖母给了我一份可爱的礼物。
words.sentence2: Please **give** me your homework book.
words.sentence2_cn: 请把你的作业本给我。

words.sentence1: We **go** to school by bus every morning.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们每天早上坐公共汽车上学。
words.sentence2: Let's **go** to the park after lunch.
words.sentence2_cn: 午饭后我们去公园吧。

words.sentence1: We **grow** tomatoes in our garden every summer.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们每年夏天在花园里种番茄。
words.sentence2: Children **grow** very quickly in their first few years.
words.sentence2_cn: 孩子在最初几年里成长非常迅速。

words.sentence1: Please **hang** your coat on the hook.
words.sentence1_cn: 请把你的外套挂在钩子上。
words.sentence2: She **hung** a picture of her family on the wall.
words.sentence2_cn: 她把一张家庭照片挂在墙上。

words.sentence1: I **have** two sisters and one brother.
words.sentence1_cn: 我有两个姐妹和一个兄弟。
words.sentence2: Do you **have** a pen I can borrow?
words.sentence2_cn: 你有钢笔可以借给我吗？

words.sentence1: Can you **hear** the music from next door?
words.sentence1_cn: 你能听到隔壁的音乐吗？
words.sentence2: She **heard** a strange noise in the garden.
words.sentence2_cn: 她听到花园里有奇怪的声音。

words.sentence1: Can you **help** me carry this heavy bag?
words.sentence1_cn: 你能帮我搬这个重包吗？
words.sentence2: She always **helps** her little brother with his reading.
words.sentence2_cn: 她总是帮助弟弟练习阅读。

words.sentence1: The cat **hid** behind the sofa.
words.sentence1_cn: 猫躲在沙发后面。
words.sentence2: I **hid** the birthday present under my bed.
words.sentence2_cn: 我把生日礼物藏在床底下。

words.sentence1: She **hit** the ball very hard with her racket.
words.sentence1_cn: 她用球拍用力打了球。
words.sentence2: The ball **hit** the window and broke it.
words.sentence2_cn: 球打到了窗户，把窗户打碎了。

words.sentence1: **Hold** my hand when we cross the road.
words.sentence1_cn: 过马路时握住我的手。
words.sentence2: She **held** the baby carefully in her arms.
words.sentence2_cn: 她小心地把婴儿抱在怀里。

words.sentence1: I walked **home** from school with my friend.
words.sentence1_cn: 我和朋友一起从学校走回家。
words.sentence2: There is no place like **home**.
words.sentence2_cn: 家是最温暖的地方。

words.sentence1: She went to the **hospital** to visit her grandmother.
words.sentence1_cn: 她去医院探望祖母。
words.sentence2: The **hospital** is near the town centre.
words.sentence2_cn: 医院在市中心附近。

words.sentence1: We stayed in a **hotel** near the beach.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们住在海边附近的酒店。
words.sentence2: The **hotel** has a lovely swimming pool.
words.sentence2_cn: 这家酒店有一个漂亮的游泳池。

words.sentence1: My **house** has three bedrooms and a garden.
words.sentence1_cn: 我家有三间卧室和一个花园。
words.sentence2: They painted their **house** yellow last summer.
words.sentence2_cn: 他们去年夏天把房子漆成黄色。

words.sentence1: We went fishing at the **lake** at the weekend.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们周末去湖边钓鱼。
words.sentence2: The **lake** is very beautiful in the morning.
words.sentence2_cn: 湖在早上非常美丽。

words.sentence1: The plane will **land** in twenty minutes.
words.sentence1_cn: 飞机将在二十分钟后降落。
words.sentence2: After two weeks at sea, they saw **land**.
words.sentence2_cn: 在海上漂了两周后，他们看到了陆地。

words.sentence1: They live in a **large** house with a big garden.
words.sentence1_cn: 他们住在一栋有大花园的大房子里。
words.sentence2: There is a **large** supermarket near our school.
words.sentence2_cn: 我们学校附近有一家大超市。

words.sentence1: The **last** bus leaves at ten o'clock at night.
words.sentence1_cn: 最后一班公共汽车晚上十点出发。
words.sentence2: The football match **lasted** for ninety minutes.
words.sentence2_cn: 足球比赛持续了九十分钟。

words.sentence1: The train was **late** because of the storm.
words.sentence1_cn: 由于暴风雨，火车晚点了。
words.sentence2: Please don't be **late** for school tomorrow.
words.sentence2_cn: 明天上学请不要迟到。

words.sentence1: Turn **left** at the traffic lights.
words.sentence1_cn: 在交通灯处左转。
words.sentence2: The school is on the **left** side of the road.
words.sentence2_cn: 学校在路的左边。

words.sentence1: Please turn on the **light** – it is too dark.
words.sentence1_cn: 请开灯——太黑了。
words.sentence2: This bag is very **light** and easy to carry.
words.sentence2_cn: 这个包很轻，容易携带。

words.sentence1: I **like** reading books about animals.
words.sentence1_cn: 我喜欢读关于动物的书。
words.sentence2: She runs **like** the wind – she is so fast.
words.sentence2_cn: 她跑得像风一样——她真的很快。

words.sentence1: I **live** in a small town near London.
words.sentence1_cn: 我住在伦敦附近的一个小镇上。
words.sentence2: She has **lived** in the same house all her life.
words.sentence2_cn: 她一生都住在同一栋房子里。

words.sentence1: It is a **long** walk from my house to the station.
words.sentence1_cn: 从我家到车站走路很长。
words.sentence2: She has very **long** hair and it is very beautiful.
words.sentence2_cn: 她有很长的头发，非常漂亮。

words.sentence1: **Look** at the birds in the sky!
words.sentence1_cn: 看天上的鸟！
words.sentence2: She **looks** very happy today.
words.sentence2_cn: 她今天看起来很开心。

words.sentence1: I **lost** my keys somewhere in the house.
words.sentence1_cn: 我把钥匙丢在房子里某处了。
words.sentence2: Our team **lost** the match yesterday by one goal.
words.sentence2_cn: 我们队昨天以一球之差输了比赛。

words.sentence1: The temperature is very **low** in winter.
words.sentence1_cn: 冬天气温非常低。
words.sentence2: Mind your head – that bridge is very **low**.
words.sentence2_cn: 注意你的头——那座桥非常低。

words.sentence1: She **makes** her own breakfast every morning.
words.sentence1_cn: 她每天早上自己做早饭。
words.sentence2: Let's **make** a card for our teacher's birthday.
words.sentence2_cn: 我们来为老师的生日做张贺卡吧。

words.sentence1: We used a **map** to find our way in the city.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们用地图在城市里找路。
words.sentence2: She drew a **map** of our school for the new student.
words.sentence2_cn: 她为新同学画了一张学校地图。

words.sentence1: Mum buys fresh vegetables at the **market**.
words.sentence1_cn: 妈妈在市场买新鲜蔬菜。
words.sentence2: The **market** opens every Saturday morning.
words.sentence2_cn: 市场每周六早上开放。

words.sentence1: What is the **matter**? You look sad.
words.sentence1_cn: 怎么了？你看起来很难过。
words.sentence2: It does not **matter** if you make a small mistake.
words.sentence2_cn: 犯小错误没关系。

words.sentence1: **May** I open the window, please?
words.sentence1_cn: 我可以打开窗户吗？
words.sentence2: It **may** rain this afternoon, so take an umbrella.
words.sentence2_cn: 今天下午可能下雨，所以带把伞。

words.sentence1: What does this word **mean** in English?
words.sentence1_cn: 这个单词用英语是什么意思？
words.sentence2: I did not **mean** to hurt your feelings.
words.sentence2_cn: 我不是故意伤害你的感情的。

words.sentence1: I **meet** my friends at the park every Saturday.
words.sentence1_cn: 我每周六在公园见朋友。
words.sentence2: Nice to **meet** you! I'm Tom.
words.sentence2_cn: 很高兴认识你！我是Tom。

words.sentence1: I drink a glass of **milk** every morning.
words.sentence1_cn: 我每天早上喝一杯牛奶。
words.sentence2: Please add some **milk** to my tea.
words.sentence2_cn: 请在我的茶里加一些牛奶。

words.sentence1: Do you **mind** if I sit here?
words.sentence1_cn: 你介意我坐这里吗？
words.sentence2: She has a very quick **mind** and learns fast.
words.sentence2_cn: 她头脑非常敏锐，学东西很快。

words.sentence1: **Mix** the flour and eggs to make a cake.
words.sentence1_cn: 把面粉和鸡蛋混合在一起做蛋糕。
words.sentence2: She **mixed** the colours to make a new shade.
words.sentence2_cn: 她把颜色混合在一起，调出了新的色调。

words.sentence1: I save my **money** to buy a new book.
words.sentence1_cn: 我存钱买一本新书。
words.sentence2: She did not have enough **money** to buy the shoes.
words.sentence2_cn: 她没有足够的钱买那双鞋。

words.sentence1: My birthday is next **month**.
words.sentence1_cn: 我的生日在下个月。
words.sentence2: We have been studying KET for four **months**.
words.sentence2_cn: 我们已经学习KET四个月了。

words.sentence1: I wake up early every **morning**.
words.sentence1_cn: 我每天早上都早起。
words.sentence2: She goes for a run in the **morning** before school.
words.sentence2_cn: 她上学前在早上跑步。

words.sentence1: My **mother** cooks the best food in the world.
words.sentence1_cn: 我妈妈做的饭是世界上最好吃的。
words.sentence2: I gave my **mother** flowers on her birthday.
words.sentence2_cn: 我在妈妈生日时送了她鲜花。

words.sentence1: I **need** to buy a new pencil case.
words.sentence1_cn: 我需要买一个新的铅笔盒。
words.sentence2: Do you **need** help with your homework?
words.sentence2_cn: 你需要帮助做作业吗？

words.sentence1: She got a **new** bicycle for her birthday.
words.sentence1_cn: 她生日收到了一辆新自行车。
words.sentence2: There is a **new** student in our class today.
words.sentence2_cn: 今天我们班来了一位新同学。

words.sentence1: She reads a book every **night** before bed.
words.sentence1_cn: 她每晚睡前读一本书。
words.sentence2: The stars are beautiful on a clear **night**.
words.sentence2_cn: 晴朗的夜晚星星非常美丽。

words.sentence1: **No**, I do not want any more cake, thank you.
words.sentence1_cn: 不，我不想再要蛋糕了，谢谢。
words.sentence2: She said **no** to the extra homework.
words.sentence2_cn: 她对额外的作业说了不。

words.sentence1: Please do not make a **noise** in the library.
words.sentence1_cn: 在图书馆请不要制造噪音。
words.sentence2: I heard a loud **noise** outside my window.
words.sentence2_cn: 我听到窗外有很大的噪音。

words.sentence1: **None** of the students knew the answer.
words.sentence1_cn: 没有一个学生知道答案。
words.sentence2: There is **none** of the cake left.
words.sentence2_cn: 蛋糕一点都没有剩下了。

words.sentence1: She cannot swim, **nor** can she ride a bike.
words.sentence1_cn: 她不会游泳，也不会骑自行车。
words.sentence2: I do not like coffee, **nor** does my sister.
words.sentence2_cn: 我不喜欢咖啡，我姐姐也不喜欢。

words.sentence1: She is **not** ready for the test yet.
words.sentence1_cn: 她还没有为考试做好准备。
words.sentence2: I did **not** finish my homework last night.
words.sentence2_cn: 我昨晚没有完成作业。

words.sentence1: We are studying English **now**.
words.sentence1_cn: 我们现在正在学习英语。
words.sentence2: **Now** is a good time to start your revision.
words.sentence2_cn: 现在是开始复习的好时机。
